title: can.Frame
description: CAN / CAN-FD / CAN XL canonical frame type (spec §15.1).

id.description: CAN arbitration ID. Standard IDs are ≤0x7FF; extended IDs are ≤0x1FFFFFFF. For CAN XL this is the 11-bit Priority ID (≤0x7FF).

ext.description: True for 29-bit extended ID format. Must be false for CAN XL. Omitted from JSON when false.

rtr.description: Remote transmission request. Must be false when fd or xl is true. Omitted from JSON when false.

fd.description: True for CAN-FD frames (supports up to 64 data bytes). Mutually exclusive with xl. Omitted from JSON when false.

brs.description: Bit-rate switch (CAN-FD only). Must be false when fd is false and for CAN XL. Omitted from JSON when false.

esi.description: Error State Indicator (CAN-FD / CAN XL only). Must be false when neither fd nor xl is set. Omitted from JSON when false.

xl.description: True for CAN XL frames (ISO 11898-1:2024; supports up to 2048 data bytes). Mutually exclusive with fd. Omitted from JSON when false.

sdt.description: CAN XL SDU Type identifying the payload content. Omitted from JSON when zero.

vcid.description: CAN XL Virtual CAN network ID. Omitted from JSON when zero.

af.description: CAN XL Acceptance Field. Omitted from JSON when zero.

sec.description: CAN XL Simple Extended Content flag. Omitted from JSON when false.

data.description: Frame data bytes, base64-encoded. Max 8 bytes for classic CAN; 64 for CAN-FD; 2048 for CAN XL (min 1).
